data.name: HardPunch: Sex Plague
data.detailed_description:
NOTE: GAME IN ACTIVE DEVELOPMENT | CONSTANTLY EVOLVING

THE WORLD

Set in a post-apocalyptic future, Hardpunch: Sex Plague takes place in a world ravaged by nuclear catastrophe. Humanity is sterile. Life now depends on bioengineering and sexual energy. A strange mutation has allowed some survivors to convert sexual energy into deadly force.

In this broken society, a fanatical cult has risen — followers of the goddess Venus — believing sex is the only path to salvation. Laboratories create adult human clones, whose sole purpose is to be vessels of energy through pleasure. These beings emerge from cocoons ready to fulfill their role in this chaotic new world.

THE HEROINE

You play as Hardpunch — a fierce, genetically gifted warrior who absorbs energy through intense sexual encounters, using that power as a weapon. Her journey is a visceral, erotic battle for survival. Every defeated enemy fuels her, both literally and figuratively. This is a world where pleasure is power, and the path to victory is paved in both blood and lust.

THE GOAL

Fight, fuck, and survive as HardPunch. Gather enough sexual energy to activate the legendary Subverse Alive-Bomb — a hidden weapon that may be humanity’s last hope.

WARNING: This game features explicit sexual content, adult themes, and is intended for mature audiences only. NSFW.

Hardpunch: Sex Plague is a fully reimagined and rebuilt version of the original 2014 animation and comic series Hardpunch: Subverse (yes, that’s the exact title — check our links for reference).

This is an unapologetically adult game. While it has a storyline, sex is at the center — not as something gratuitous, but as a driving force in the world and mechanics of the game. The complete narrative will unfold through future updates and planned DLCs.

The player explores an open world in the third person. It is necessary to survive until the end. In other words, find the portal of triumph and cross it to transport yourself to a new world. During this challenge, it is important to collect items of all types (health, stamina, bladed weapons, etc.). There are no firearms in this future. Practically the weapons available are swords, knives, and shields.

After all, there are spoils. Dying humans are kept on platforms in order to provide energy. Whoever has the power to absorb through sex is supplied in these places. However, there will always be a creature protecting these posts. The main objective is to obtain enough sexual energy to activate the powerful Alive-Bomb Subverse that is hidden in the last level of the game. This machine could become the only hope for this world lost to nuclear cataclysm.

Playing is extremely easy because you can use your computer's keyboard and mouse or you can choose a joystick.

Recommendation: Better experience when playing with the keyboard.

This game is for PC Windows and is not heavy to play. The interface offers a lot of gameplay information. In addition, you can count on the help of a complete inventory.

data.short_description: Set in a post-apocalyptic future, Hardpunch: Sex Plague takes place in a world ravaged by nuclear catastrophe. Humanity is sterile. Life now depends on bioengineering and sexual energy. A strange mutation has allowed some survivors to convert sexual energy into deadly force.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Core i5-11600K
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia RTX 2060 and AMD RX 5500
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: i7-10700K
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GEFORCE RTX 2070, AMD RX5700 XT or Higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間
